silver-focus-ring.name: Silver Focus Ring
silver-focus-ring.description: A narrow ring that steadies spellcasting gestures.

cutpurse-signet.name: Cutpurse Signet
cutpurse-signet.description: A stolen noble seal repurposed as proof that bold lies often work.

raven-mark.name: Raven Mark
raven-mark.description: An obsidian brooch traded only among killers with reputations to protect.

halo-seal.name: Halo Seal
halo-seal.description: A thin circle of blessed silver that settles over its bearer like calm.

copper-band.name: Copper Band
copper-band.description: A tarnished copper ring stamped with a fist.

willow-ring.name: Willow Ring
willow-ring.description: A thin ring carved from sacred willow wood.

signet-of-valor.name: Signet of Valor
signet-of-valor.description: A signet ring awarded to soldiers who held the line.

spellthread-band.name: Spellthread Band
spellthread-band.description: Woven from enchanted thread that hums when spells are near.

quicksilver-ring.name: Quicksilver Ring
quicksilver-ring.description: A liquid-silver band that seems to shift and flow.

devotion-ring.name: Devotion Ring
devotion-ring.description: Blessed by a traveling priest during the autumn rites.

ranger-loop.name: Ranger's Loop
ranger-loop.description: A braided leather ring worn by frontier scouts.

warhammer-seal.name: Warhammer Seal
warhammer-seal.description: An iron seal ring bearing the mark of a siege-breaker company.

leystone-band.name: Leystone Band
leystone-band.description: Cut from stone found at a ley-line convergence.

pathfinder-ring.name: Pathfinder's Ring
pathfinder-ring.description: Worn by elite trailblazers who never lose their way.

conqueror-signet.name: Conqueror's Signet
conqueror-signet.description: Taken from the hand of a fallen warlord. It still radiates command.

archmage-loop.name: Archmage's Loop
archmage-loop.description: A ring that bends light around itself, humming with raw arcana.

phantom-ring.name: Phantom Ring
phantom-ring.description: Said to phase slightly out of reality, making the wearer harder to grasp.

covenant-ring.name: Covenant Ring
covenant-ring.description: A ring exchanged between temple guardians as a vow of protection.

hawk-eye-band.name: Hawk-Eye Band
hawk-eye-band.description: A jade ring carved with raptor eyes that sharpen distant sight.

tyrant-seal.name: Tyrant's Seal
tyrant-seal.description: The ruling ring of a conquered kingdom. Its weight feels like authority.

voidloop.name: Voidloop
voidloop.description: A ring of condensed void-matter that whispers forgotten incantations.

shadow-sovereign.name: Shadow Sovereign
shadow-sovereign.description: A pitch-black band that drinks light. Thieves kill for this ring.

saints-circle.name: Saint's Circle
saints-circle.description: A ring worn by the last true saint. It glows faintly in darkness.

horizon-band.name: Horizon Band
horizon-band.description: Forged at the edge of the world where land meets sky.

permafrost-band.name: Permafrost Band
permafrost-band.description: A ring forged from permafrost ore. Cold power circulates through it.

volcanic-signet.name: Volcanic Signet
volcanic-signet.description: A ring forged in the caldera. It pulses with heat.

void-signet.name: Void Signet
void-signet.description: A ring that contains a pocket of void. Pulses with dark energy.
